Name: All India Employee Association
Description:

If you wish to contribute to the community, become our member here:
 https://aiea.co.in/member.html

However, if you are taking our membership only to seek help, please do not apply. We need genuine individuals who truly want to help and support others.

By becoming a member, you take an oath to stand by fellow members and contribute towards the betterment of society.

Description:

Opérateur du ministère de l’Europe et des Affaires étrangères, elle réunit l’Etat, des collectivités territoriales et des associations autour d’une mission d’intérêt général : le développement et la promotion du volontariat international d’échange et de solidarité.

La plateforme s’appuie sur une présence en France (hexagone et territoires d’outre-mer) et sur un réseau d’Espaces Volontariats en Afrique, Asie, Amérique latine/Caraïbes, Moyen-Orient et Océanie.

Name: Kauffman Fellows
Description:
Since 1995, Kauffman Fellows has accelerated the development and success of venture capital investors around the world, supporting Fellows to navigate every aspect of innovation investing, from deal flow to public markets. With 800+ Fellows across 65 countries, Kauffman Fellows is the largest network of VCs and innovation leaders in the world. In the 27 years since inception, Kauffman Fellows have started hundreds of funds, raised and deployed hundreds of billions of dollars in capital, and helped pave the way for some of the world’s most groundbreaking companies. As a network, Kauffman Fellows represent over $290 billion in assets under management, have collectively raised over $790 billion dollars in capital, and have been responsible for over $8.5 trillion in exits to LPs.

For more information visit www.kauffmanfellows.org

Name: Kolkata IT Hub
Description:
Welcome to the Kolkata IT Hub LinkedIn page! 

We are a passionate group of tech enthusiasts based in Kolkata who are deeply in love with our city and are committed to taking initiatives for its betterment. As a fully non-profit community, our main goal is to foster growth and opportunities in the IT sector while addressing the city's challenges.

At Kolkata IT Hub, we believe in upholding and maximizing the potential of our city. Through engaging discussions, we aim to identify and address the flaws that hinder its progress, while exploring new horizons in the IT sector. By creating a platform for professionals, business leaders, organizations, and aspiring individuals, we aim to showcase and share the love for being a part of Kolkata's remarkable growth story.

Our community is dedicated to featuring experiences from various perspectives within the IT sector. We believe that by highlighting success stories, challenges, and innovative solutions, we can inspire and empower others to contribute to Kolkata's development. We encourage open dialogue, collaboration, and knowledge-sharing among our members, as we firmly believe that collective efforts are essential for creating lasting positive impact.

As a non-profit community, all our activities and initiatives are driven by our shared passion for the city and its IT sector. We do not seek financial gains, but rather strive to create meaningful connections, foster professional development, and enhance the overall ecosystem in Kolkata.

Join us in our mission to make Kolkata a thriving hub for technology, innovation, and growth. Together, we can shape a brighter future for our beloved city. Connect with us to stay updated on our latest initiatives, events, and opportunities to contribute.

Join our Telegram channel -  https://t.me/kolkataithub
for latest job openings and event updates in Kolkata.

Any collaboration requests should be sent to kolkataitdevelopment@gmail.com

Name: UNICEF Madagascar
Description:
With a population of nearly 30 million people, half of them under the age of 18, the future of Madagascar belongs to young people. UNICEF Madagascar is committed to improving their lives. By 2028, UNICEF aims to vaccinate 90% of children under one-year-old against measles, up from the current rate of 69%. We’re also working to increase access to safe water, which currently only 58% of the population can reach, to improve the health and well-being of the population, while improving reading and numeracy skills in children aged 7 to 14. Reducing early marriage and early pregnancies are also priorities in a country where 39% of women are married before the age of 18, as is improving childhood nutrition to address stunting. 
 
Join us in creating a better future for Malagasy children!

Name: WoodGreen Community Services
Description:
Every year, WoodGreen provides more than 37,000 Toronto residents with the tools and support they need to thrive. As one of the largest social service agencies in Toronto, we remove barriers and empower the clients we serve. We also work closely with our clients and community and thought leaders to reshape social service delivery to better serve our community.


Our services include:
 
- Resources to find safe, affordable, and supportive housing
- Physical and mental health services delivered by an interdisciplinary team
- Seniors’ services promoting health, active living and independence
- Assistance for neurodiverse adults and children and their caregivers
- Financial counselling and workshops to build financial skills
- Employment services and training opportunities to support job seekers
- High-quality child care and enriching after-school programs
- A wrap-around education and employment program for single mothers
- Settlement services for recent immigrants and refugees
- Youth social and mental health services designed by young people

We proudly welcome and serve people of all religions, races, cultures, gender identities, and sexual orientations.

As a United Way Anchor Agency, WoodGreen is part of a strong network of local agencies striving to develop innovative solutions to critical social needs.

Name: We Are The Dead
Description:
We are the Dead is a sister organization to Flanders Fields, to carry their mission to those encountered on the streets, on the dope track, in the prisons and in the hell of addiction or sex trafficking who aren't veterans.  Nobody on the Flanders team will step over the dead bodies of civilians to save a vet, but within the confines of the charter, funding can only be allocated to veterans.  The need to stand up a second org focused on non-veteran funding for rescues and recoveries was immediately apparent, and to date, the Flanders team has been funding these efforts out of their own pockets, but no more!  We are the Dead gets it's name from the same poem by LtCol John McCrae that Flanders Fields got it's name from, which reads in part: "

We are the Dead. Short days ago
We lived, felt dawn, saw sunset glow,
    Loved and were loved, and now we lie
        In Flanders fields."

We are here to restore life to those who were once dead to their addictions and the streets, for we were once the dead ourselves.

Name: JSPT Consultants Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Jan Suraaj is a one-of-a-kind grassroots initiative driven by the people of Bihar and led by renowned political strategist Prashant Kishor.

The Jan Suraaj Fellowship is designed to empower dynamic young individuals at the regional level who are eager to engage in active political movements and gain hands-on experience. This program offers a unique opportunity to learn the nuances of political engagement while contributing meaningfully to the democratic process.

It is committed to strengthening Indian democracy by reaching the most underserved and unheard sections of society. Since its inception, over 2000 fellows have joined the program, working in diverse roles across Bihar to help drive impactful change on the ground.

Name: LBV - Legião da Boa Vontade
Description:
A Legião da Boa Vontade (LBV) é uma associação civil de direito privado, beneficente, sem fins econômicos, ecumênica, apolítica e apartidária, com atuação preponderante na Assistência Social, que também oferece Educação Básica e técnica profissionalizante, além de realizar ações humanitárias, culturais e de comunicação social e educativa.
 
Foi fundada no Brasil, em 1950, no dia 1º de janeiro (Dia da Paz e da Confraternização Universal), pelo radialista e poeta Alziro Zarur (1914-1979) e tem como presidente o jornalista, escritor, compositor e educador José de Paiva Netto.

Name: Black Think Tank Community
Description:
The Black Think Tank Community’s MISSION to act in OUR interest (everyone is welcome), create opportunities and improve OUR quality of life.  

We meet  on the 1st Sunday of every month at 6pm CST to empower our members to INVEST in themselves by presenting a network of subject matter experts (SMEs) in the Black Think Tank Community or its partners, sharing resources, information, tools in personal finance (credit, home ownership, financial literacy, jobs, taxes, investments, insurance, estate planning) business, career advancement, health & education. 

Our goal is to help our members have SAFE place that supports them while empowering them to invest in themselves.  We want to help you without dependence.

Name: Liderança Feminina em Angola
Description:
The Women's Leadership Project in Angola formally began its activity on the 9th of February, 2019, with the Mission of Valuing Women Leadership.
It is born of a dream and a need in which Women must establish more relationships of trust, perform more networking and consequently make and build success stories, developing for this purpose their maximum potential.

Based on three Values:

Collaboration
We are committed to strengthening our ties with our community, promoting a culture of collaboration and solidarity in all our initiatives.

Transformation
We believe in the power of personal and organizational transformation. Therefore, we invest in coaching and mentoring to develop talents and competencies that are truly transformative, driving the growth and success of all involved.

Future Generations
We are committed to investing in the development of tomorrow's leaders, empowering them with the tools and resources necessary to face the challenges of the future with confidence and determination. 

Since January 8, 2024, we have adhered to the United Nations Global Compact.

www.liderancafemininaangola.com

Name: DECHEMA
Description:
DECHEMA Gesellschaft für Chemische Technik und Biotechnologie e.V. (Society for Chemical Engineering and Biotechnology) brings together experts from a wide range of disciplines, institutions and generations to stimulate scientific exchange in chemical engineering, process engineering and biotechnology. We identify and evaluate emerging technological trends and facilitate the transfer of research results into industrial applications.

DECHEMA is the hub of an interdisciplinary network of topic-oriented committees, organizing events and professional development courses for all who are interested in a specialized subject area. DECHEMA has over 5,800 members - individuals, institutions and companies. The Biotechnology Section and ProcessNet, the joint platform for chemical engineering, are the forums where scientists, engineers, students, companies and institutions meet for knowledge exchange and discussion.

In addition, we administer funding programmes as well as national and European research clusters.

As a member of AiF we organize industrial cooperative research projects. Together with DECHEMA Ausstellungs-GmbH we are the organizers of ACHEMA, the world forum for the process industry.

We cooperate closely  with the DECHEMA-Forschungsinstitut, which is dedicated to research for sustainable technologies in biotechnology, materials science and chemical engineering. 

Imprint: http://dechema.de/en/impressum_en

Name: Turkishe
Description:
Gerçek bir hayat hikayesinden uyarlanmıştır!
Turkishe | Genç Kadınların Gelişimi ve Liderlik Yolculuğu İçin Bir Platform

Turkishe, 18-25 yaş arası genç kadınların hem kişisel hem de profesyonel gelişimlerini destekleyen bir platformdur. Hedefimiz, genç kadınların liderlik becerilerini geliştirmelerine, kariyer hedeflerini gerçekleştirmelerine ve kendi potansiyellerini keşfetmelerine olanak tanıyan bir ekosistem sunmaktır.

 Turkishe’nin Öne Çıkanları:

Özgüveni ve liderlik becerilerini artırmaya yönelik kapsamlı eğitim programları,
Alanında uzman mentorlarla birebir rehberlik fırsatları,
Genç kadınları bir araya getiren güçlü bir topluluk ve profesyonel ağ.
Turkishe, iş dünyasında ve toplumsal hayatta fark yaratmak isteyen genç kadınlara rehberlik eden bir çözüm ortağıdır. Kurumlarla birlikte çalışarak, daha kapsayıcı bir geleceğin inşasında aktif rol alıyor, genç kadın liderlerin yetişmesi için stratejik programlar tasarlıyoruz.

 Daha fazla bilgi ve iş birliği için: info@turki-she.com
Kadınların gücünü keşfedin, birlikte büyüyelim.

Name: Global Sustainable Action Alliance
Description:
We back what the world needs next.

The Global Sustainable Action Alliance (GSAA) is the organizing force behind DISC — the Dedicated Impact & Sustainability Corridor.

Name: The Men's Book Breakfast  ~ The MBB
Description:
The Men’s Book Breakfast is a unique gathering that assembles men with the following objectives:

	1.	To share their life and leadership experiences.
	2.	To engage in mentoring and mutual growth.
	3.	To inspire and empower men to embrace their roles in society, beginning with their families.
	4.	To acquire knowledge across various facets of life.

Our meeting sessions take place online, and we host four Seasons each year, one per quarter. Each season comprises 5 to 6 one-hour morning meetings (adjusted for different time zones), where participants delve into the discussion of a selected book.

While our values are predominantly rooted in the Christian faith, our forum welcomes individuals from diverse faith backgrounds, countries, industry sectors, and life experiences. The forum was initiated by Lawrence Githinji, a figure in the marketplace.

To join a season, keep an eye out for sign-up announcements here on LinkedIn and also on Twitter: @TheBookBreakfa1.

Contact Information:
Email: ourbookbreakfast@gmail.com
Twitter: @TheBookBreakfa1

Name: Society for People Analytics
Description:
OUR MISSION
Empowering Excellence in the People Analytics Community

At SPA, we are committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive community where people analytics professionals can thrive. Our mission is to empower excellence by providing resources, support, and opportunities that elevate the practice of people analytics across the globe.

WHY WE STARTED

In recent years, the field of people analytics has seen remarkable growth, with professionals eager to connect, learn, and advance their practices. However, despite the increase in meet-ups and gatherings, there has been a noticeable lack of consistency in protocol and content, with many events heavily reliant on vendor participation. Recognizing the need for a centralized, vendor-neutral space where practitioners of all levels can communicate, network, and grow, the Society for People Analytics was born.

Name: ML Humanitaire
Description:
M.L Humanitaire 

Mission :
M.L Humanitaire s'engage à renforcer les capacités des acteurs humanitaires afin de maximiser leur impact dans des contextes complexes et en évolution rapide. 

Notre mission est d'apporter des compétences pratiques et des connaissances spécialisées pour améliorer la réponse aux crises humanitaires et contribuer au développement durable des communautés vulnérables.

Domaines d'Expertise :
ML Humanitaire se spécialise dans la formation humanitaire et de développement durable.

Programmes de Formation :
Nous proposons des programmes de formation adaptés aux besoins des travailleurs humanitaires, des ONG, des agences gouvernementales et des volontaires. 

Nos cours incluent des simulations réalistes, des études de cas basées sur des situations réelles et des séances interactives pour préparer les participants aux défis concrets sur le terrain.

Formateurs et Consultants :
Les formateurs de M.L Humanitaire sont des experts chevronnés ayant une expérience significative dans des situations humanitaires variées. Ils partagent leurs connaissances pratiques et leurs compétences opérationnelles, garantissant une préparation adéquate aux professionnels engagés dans des missions humanitaires.

Approche Personnalisée :
Nous comprenons la diversité des besoins dans le domaine humanitaire. Ainsi, nous proposons des programmes sur mesure, tenant compte des spécificités géographiques, culturelles et sectorielles de nos clients.

Outils Pédagogiques :
Nos formations intègrent une variété d'outils pédagogiques, tels que des scénarios interactifs, des séances de simulation sur le terrain, des modules d'apprentissage en ligne et des ateliers pratiques.

Name: CMO Bangladesh
Description:

We bring together insights on branding, consumer behavior, advertising, media and case studies while also covering the fundamentals of product, price, promotion, distribution, supply chain and packaging. We provide role refresh updates for marketing professionals and represent the vibe of Bangladeshi marketers.

From AI-driven marketing to startup innovation, customer experience and global best practices we deliver the knowledge that drives growth and effective market penetration in Bangladesh. With timely marketing news, business strategies and industry insights CMO Bangladesh helps professionals turn ideas into impact and brands into leaders.

Name: AVA International
Description: AVA International equips advocates through producing impactful events and year-round collaboration. Our work strengthens strategy, funding pathways, and shared capacity across all world regions to accelerate impact at a global scale.

Name: Marketers.com.bd
Description:
Marketer.com.bd is a vibrant community dedicated to connecting, inspiring, and empowering marketing professionals across Bangladesh. This platform serves as a hub for marketers of all levels, fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, and professional growth. With a focus on innovation, trends, and best practices in the marketing world, the community organizes events, workshops, and discussions that help members stay ahead in the fast-evolving industry. Whether you're a seasoned expert or just starting your journey in marketing, Marketers of Bangladesh offers a supportive network to learn, grow, and thrive together.

Say hello - marketers.com.bd@gmail.com

Name: Goldeimer
Description:
3.4 billion people worldwide have no access to safe sanitation – we want to change that. We are Goldeimer, a non-profit company from Hamburg, Germany, aiming to transform the linear sanitation system and provide access to safely managed toilets for all. Our work has many faces: We set up dry toilets at festivals to offer a sustainable alternative to existing sanitation solutions and draw attention to the global sanitation crisis. We give workshops, sell social products such as our recycled toilet paper and de-taboo the loo with loud campaigns. 

We are a not-for-profit company, which means that all revenue from the sale of our products and every working hour feeds into our non-profit work and WASH projects around the world, creating access to water, sanitation and hygiene. 

We implemented steward-ownership in 2022 and put the common good at the center of our work.

Name: Products by Women
Description:
Products by Women is a global community for women in tech, business, and entrepreneurship. We help women launch careers, break into leadership, build wealth, and connect with top opportunities.

Through mentorship, upskilling, and a strong network, we create a future where women don’t wait for opportunities—they build their own.

Name: First Nations Foundation
Description:
First Nations Foundation (FNF) is dedicated to empowering Indigenous Australians to take control of their financial future through all aspects of their training and education initiatives. As the only national First Nations financial education provider in Australia, FNF leverages evidence-based research to inform its programs and advocate for systemic changes to enhance financial security among First Nations Australians.

FNF provides culturally sensitive financial education, training and information that empowers First Nations people, regardless of where they fall on the wealth continuum.

Name: Animal & Vegan Advocacy (AVA) Summit
Description:
The AVA Summit is a global gathering dedicated to uniting advocates, activists, and change-makers working toward systemic for farmed animals by removing them from our food system and other human use. Organized by AVA International, our Summits bring together leaders from the animal rights and vegan advocacy movement to focus on strategies that challenge the foundations of industrial animal agriculture and drive long-term societal transformation.

At each event, we provide a platform for thought-provoking speakers, interactive workshops, and collaborative networking that empowers attendees to tackle the systemic issues surrounding farmed animal exploitation. Our goal is to equip everyone, from experienced advocates to new activists looking to work professionally in the movement, with the tools, strategies, and connections needed to drive real change in policy, business, media, culture, and more.

The AVA Summit is about more than just raising awareness — it's about creating tangible systemic shifts that lead to a world where farmed animals are no longer exploited for food.

Join us as we work together to strategize, collaborate, and build the movement that will reshape our global systems for farmed animals.

Name: Confiniti
